name: Halifax 23.81" Farmhouse Wood Counter Height Barstool with Footrest - Threshold™
description:
Enhance the look of any counter, high-top dining table or home pub with the functional simplicity of the Halifax Farmhouse Wood Counter Stool from Threshold™. This 23.81-inch stool is constructed from solid, sturdy hardwood in a distressed finish, lending your space a touch of country-chic charm. It stands on four flared, square legs with foot rails for better stability, and is topped off with a curved seat for enhanced comfort and style. Plus, the backless and armless design offers a space-saving seating solution to any room.

Threshold™: Looks like home, feels like you.
